degree: Higher Technician for Development and Management of Biomedical IT Solutions (TIB)
description: Specialized technical diploma focused on biomedical informatics, software development, and healthcare IT systems. Comprehensive training in full-stack development, database management, and medical software standards. Included 6-month internship at CodaQ S.r.l.s. developing healthcare applications.

institution: Istituto Tecnico Statale "Grazia Deledda - Max Fabiani"
degree: High School Diploma in Chemistry, Materials, and Biotechnology
description: Technical high school education with focus on chemistry, materials science, and biotechnology. Strong foundation in scientific methodology, laboratory techniques, and analytical thinking that complements software development career.
